api_structure.note: Uses SAME obj_konfig pattern as Fenster but with different properties
api_structure.response_format: HTML with Preisempfehlung only (NO Ersparnis/Angebotspreis breakdown in API response)
api_structure.key_difference: API returns only Preisempfehlung, not the 3-line breakdown like Fenster

discount.note: The 40% discount is applied on the FRONTEND, not returned by the API. The API only returns Preisempfehlung (full price). Your backend should store Preisempfehlung and apply your own margin/discount.

pricing_formula.description: Preisempfehlung = BasePriceForModel(width, height) + ProfileSurcharge + ColorSurcharge + GlassSurcharge + SecuritySurcharge + AccessSystemSurcharge + HingeSurcharge
pricing_formula.note: Model selection changes the base price significantly. Left/Right variants (_l/_r) are identical in price.

dimension_analysis.base_config: Profile p2, Model m1_l, Color fs1_01 (White), Glass g3, 800x1900mm
dimension_analysis.key_insight: Width has 23x more price impact than height (37.77 vs 1.64 EUR per 100mm). This is the OPPOSITE of Fenster where both dimensions have significant impact.

tier_2_sidelite.description: Door with side panel or top panel

tier_3_double.description: Door with double side panels or complex layouts

models.note: Left (_l) and Right (_r) variants always have identical prices. 3 distinct price tiers.

tier_1_foil_interior.description: Interior foil colors and RAL colors

tier_2_standard_foil.description: Standard exterior foil colors (Nussbaum, Anthrazit, etc.)

griff_kombi.note: All 8 handle combinations (gk_1 through gk_8) have ZERO surcharge. Handle selection is cosmetic only.

zks_1_variants.note: Electronic access systems with SIGNIFICANT surcharges (912-1142 EUR). Multiple sub-types with different prices.

key_differences_from_fenster: API returns only Preisempfehlung (no Ersparnis/Angebotspreis breakdown)
Width has 23x more price impact than height (opposite of Fenster where both matter)
Model selection creates 3 distinct price tiers with large jumps (0 / +75 / +361 EUR)
Electronic access systems (Zugriffssystem) add 900-1142 EUR — largest single surcharge
Handle combinations are purely cosmetic (no price impact)
Only 2 profiles available (p2, p4) vs 6 for Fenster
Color tier system is different: 5 tiers (0 / 25 / 146 / 259 / 349 EUR)
backend_verdict: EXTEND - Same obj_konfig pattern and API endpoint, but needs Haustüren-specific option tables, model tier logic, and dimension formula. Can share the same engine with a product-type switch.
